prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年持续 上升，2021年第83名→2024年第70名→2026年第71名，学校综合实力和认可度稳步提升；2025年声誉评价为偏负面，主要因生命科学学院就业率仅4.63%引发关注；抖音热度排名第62位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等；未见明显投档断档记录；统计学A-、生态学A、民族学A+，其中统计学与物理类招生的统计学、数 据科学与大数据技术等专业直接相关，对相关专业报考有正向吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 物理类相关专业中，计算机类社会热度推荐、电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程 及其自动化高热推荐、临床医学推荐，热门工科专业整体热度高；重庆市2026年高考总人数约20.9万，较2025年略有减少，物理类估算约13.7万人，竞争压力略有缓解；省控线20 25年本科批425分，较2024年427分基本持平；云南大学位于昆明市，与重庆同属西南地区，地域偏好较强；该校在重庆招生占比约2.5%（2025年），属中等水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026年计划小幅扩招3.4%、学校软科排名提升、热门工科专业社会热度高等因素，在2025年基准27774名基础上，扩招效应使位次数 字略增大，但热门专业吸引力和考生竞争加剧有对冲。预测2026年物理类最低位次约28542名，区间28042–29042名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 17818 → 20315 → 21407 → 35590 → 27774, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. In 2024, there was an abnormal significant drop (35590), and in 2025, it rebounded notably to 27774, but still higher than the 2021–2023 levels, indicating unstable competition in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Chongqing was 82 in 2021, 90 in 2022, 89 in 2023, 95 in 2024, and 88 in 2025, remaining generally stable. The 2026 plan is 91, a slight expansion of about 3.4% compared to 2025, with limited expansion magnitude.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been rising in recent years, from 83rd in 2021 to 70th in 2024 and 71st in 2026, indicating steady improvement in comprehensive strength and recognition. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to the employment rate of the School of Life Sciences being only 4.63%, which attracted attention. The Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, evaluated as 'average', with medium short video exposure. No obvious record of admission cut-off breaks. Disciplines: Statistics A-, Ecology A, Ethnology A+. Among them, Statistics is directly related to Physics Category majors such as Statistics and Data Science and Big Data Technology, providing positive attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Among Physics Category related majors, Computer Science is socially hot recommended, Electronic Information/Communication is highly hot recommended, Electrical Engineering and Automation is highly hot recommended, Clinical Medicine is recommended. Overall, popular engineering majors have high heat. In 2026, the total number of college entrance exam takers in Chongqing is about 209,000, slightly decreasing from 2025, with Physics Category estimated at about 137,000, easing competition pressure slightly. The provincial control line for undergraduate batch in 2025 is 425 points, basically flat compared to 427 points in 2024. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the same Southwest region as Chongqing, with strong regional preference. The university's enrollment proportion in Chongqing is about 2.5% (2025), at a medium level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as large fluctuations in historical rankings, a slight 3.4% expansion in the 2026 plan, improvement in the university's Soft Science ranking, and high social heat for popular engineering majors, based on the 2025 baseline of 27774, the expansion effect slightly increases the ranking number, but the attractiveness of popular majors and intensified competition among candidates offset each other. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 28542, with a range of 28042–29042.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (28042–29042), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is better than the lower limit of the range (<28042), you can focus on aiming for Tier 1 popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Data Science. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (>29042), you should mainly consider Tier 3 majors. Note that although Environmental Science and Engineering is related to the A-level discipline of Ecology, its social heat is relatively low, and it can be considered as a balance between disciplinary advantage and admission difficulty.

The 2026 plan is 23, an increase of about 21% compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and will somewhat alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has been rising in recent years: 83rd in 2021 → 70th in 2024 → 71st in 2026. The university's comprehensive strength and recognition are steadily improving, enhancing its appeal to candidates. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to the Life Sciences College's employment rate of only 4.63% attracting attention. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure. No significant enrollment gaps were recorded. It has A+ in Ethnology (top in the country), A in Ecology, and A- in Statistics, totaling 3 A- or above disciplines, which are directly related to History Category majors such as Ethnology and Sociology, adding some appeal to related majors.

专业热度与地域.text: Among History Category related majors, Chinese Language and Literature is socially hot (recommended), Law is divided and wait-and-see, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, in the same Southwest region as Chongqing, with strong regional preference. 预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the 21% enrollment expansion in 2026 alleviating competition, the university's improving Soft Science ranking enhancing appeal, and a slight decrease in total candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 3804, the expansion effect will increase the ranking number, but the university's level improvement and intensified competition will offset this.
